{{CargoClone
|name=Godpapa
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=104
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Per 10% HP lost, {race} RUSH +60
|gene4=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Gene Simulation Power Checks -0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Gene Simulation Power Checks -1.5%
|}}
